description: Showcase your support for the LGBTQ community with our vibrant email newsletter, perfect for Pride Month. Designed with inclusivity in mind, this email template is a powerful tool to express solidarity, celebrate diversity, and promote equality. It features a rainbow color palette, synonymous with the LGBTQ Pride Month, to encapsulate the spirit of unity and love. Whether you're an organization advocating for LGBTQ rights, a business wishing to express your support, or an individual wanting to raise awareness, this newsletter is an excellent way to engage with your audience. Harness the power of inclusivity and celebrate your colors with this visually striking email template.
short_description: Show your support for the LGBTQ community with our vibrant Pride Month email newsletter. Designed for inclusivity, this template is perfect for organizations, businesses, or individuals advocating for LGBTQ rights. Celebrate diversity and promote equality with our engaging, rainbow-themed newsletter.

designer.description: I am a graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and photography. Currently working freelance and open for new work!

html_data:
CELEBRATE YOUR

COLORS

It's a time for queer celebration, solidarity, vigils and tributes to those who have been lost due to hate and intolerance. It’s exciting, often playful, sometimes sad, and incredibly important month for our queer community. Join our celebration!

 
 
 

UP TO 50% OFF

MAKE AN IMPACT!

 

Our Head Turners

 

Fashonistas!

 

For Kings and Queens

 

Our Top 5

 
SHOP NOW
 

EACH PURCHASE FROM OUR PRIDE COLLECTION WILL COME WITH A LITTLE GIFT ;)

Valid from 6/1 to 7/1 or until we run out of stock

 
 
 
 

WE HELP EACH OTHER

All the funds raised from this sale will go to help our friend in our local community, whom with we work closely all year

LEARN MORE

Delivery Information   |   About Us   |   Contact

 Changed your mind? You can unsubscribe at any time.
